title: StudioDash Guide
description: Everything you need to know about StudioDash, from getting started and integrations to analytics, reporting, security, and future development.
summary: Use this guide to explore every part of StudioDash, understand its features, and discover how it helps manage your apps and developer services from one place.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need in One Guide
featureShowcases.summary: Follow a clear path through StudioDash, from getting started to advanced reporting and analytics.
featureShowcases.body: Whether you're discovering StudioDash for the first time or exploring its more advanced features, this guide walks you through every major part of the product. Learn how integrations, dashboards, analytics, reporting, and automation work together to help you manage your apps and services more effectively.
bullets: Start with the Overview, Private Beta, Features, and Integrations.
Discover dashboards, analytics, and provider insights.
Finish with reporting, automation, security, release notes, and screenshots.

sections.heading: Start Here
paragraphs: Begin with the [StudioDash Overview](/apps/studiodash), then explore the [Private Beta](/apps/studiodash/private-beta), [Features](/apps/studiodash/features), and [Integrations](/apps/studiodash/integrations) pages. Together they introduce StudioDash, explain its capabilities, and show how supported services fit into the wider platform.
StudioDash is currently preparing for private beta, so some features are available today while others continue to evolve as development progresses.
bullets: Overview introduces StudioDash and its goals.
Private Beta explains availability and invitations.
Integrations explains the supported developer services.

sections.heading: Explore Your Dashboard & Analytics
paragraphs: Next, discover how StudioDash brings together app performance, revenue, website analytics, advertising, and provider health into one workspace.
Dedicated pages explain how to monitor your apps, understand historical trends, review operational information, and investigate changes using detailed analytics.
bullets: Revenue Analytics tracks income across connected providers.
App Store Analytics helps monitor downloads, ratings, reviews, and releases.
Website & SEO Analytics combines Cloudflare and Google Search Console insights.

sections.heading: Manage Your Studio
paragraphs: StudioDash also includes tools to help you understand reporting, synchronisation, provider health, and security.
These pages explain how data is refreshed, how providers are monitored, and how StudioDash helps you manage multiple services with confidence.
bullets: Reporting explains historical summaries and exports.
Automation & Sync covers provider health and synchronisation.
Security & Privacy explains credentials, permissions, and data protection.

sections.heading: Helpful Resources
paragraphs: The remaining guides provide additional information to help you get the most from StudioDash.
Browse the FAQ for quick answers, Release Notes to follow development progress, and Screenshots for a visual tour of the application.
